title: Useful recipes
description: Usefull recipes for your minecraft world!
body:
Useful Recipes datapack adds custom crafting recipes to Minecraft, making uncraftable items available through balanced and intuitive recipes. Many players regret not being able to craft some very useful things and spend hours searching for them, but now you can craft them! Perfect solution for survival players who want more flexibility and convenience without cheating.

Includes recipes for items like:

- Nether Star
- Trident
- Crying Obsidian
- Bell
- Flower Pot
- Sea pickles
- Mob spawner (1.21.x only)

_To ​​download the datapack to your world, you need to drop it into the datapack folder of your world_
